LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S MOTION TO TRANSFER THE CASE TO ALAMEDA IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. PLAINTIFF JOANNE BURTON IS REQUIRED TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. ORDER IS SIGNED.* (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK) *AFTER THE CASE IS CALLED, PLAINTIFF APPEARS LATE. THE COURT ANNOUNCES THE RULING TO PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THE RULINGS.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Oct-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joanne C. Burton, 925-460-6324 Plaintiff in Pro Per appears late after the case is called.
Matthew Day, Esq. 714-347-6122 of State Compensation Insurance Fund for Defendant STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION.

Defendant State Compensation Insurance Fund's motion to transfer the case to Alameda is granted. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Alameda County Superior Court. Plaintiff Joanne Burton is required to pay all transfer costs.

Order is signed.* (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

*After the case is called, Plaintiff appears late. The Court announces the ruling to Plaintiff and Plaintiff does not oppose the rulings.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joanne C. Burton, 925-460-6324 Plaintiff in Pro Per appears late after the case is called.
Matthew Day, Esq. 714-347-6122 of State Compensation Insurance Fund for Defendant STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND through Court Call.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion to transfer.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
